title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Your Team Responsibilities:

MSCI **Data Tech – Data Science** is a central team responsible for building and managing **data\-centric and AI\-driven applications and capabilities** that support all major business verticals across the firm, including **ESG, Index, Analytics, and Real Estate**. The team enables high\-quality financial decision\-making by delivering scalable, reliable, and compliant AI solutions used by some of the world’s largest financial services organizations.
We are seeking **AI Engineers at Associate and Senior Associate levels** to support MSCI’s **AI adoption journey**, with a focus on **machine learning, NLP, GenAI, LLMs, and agentic AI systems**. These roles are hands\-on and engineering\-focused, centered on building, integrating, and operationalizing AI capabilities across internal platforms and client\-facing products.
Your Key Responsibilities:
**AI \& Data Science Application Development*** Design, develop, and maintain data science and AI\-driven applications that support multiple MSCI business lines.
* Implement machine learning, NLP, and GenAI solutions that move from experimentation to production.
* Build and integrate LLM\-powered capabilities such as retrieval\-augmented generation (RAG), summarization, classification, extraction, and reasoning into enterprise platforms.

**GenAI, LLMs \& Agentic AI*** Develop and enhance solutions using LLMs, LangChain, LangGraph, and agentic AI frameworks.
* Apply best practices in prompt engineering, orchestration, evaluation, and monitoring to ensure consistent, reliable AI outputs.
* Work with structured and unstructured data, including text processing, embeddings, and vector\-based retrieval.

**Platform Integration \& Cross\-Functional Collaboration*** Support teams across Data, Technology, and Engineering to integrate AI services with MSCI’s data science platforms and APIs.
* Engage with content expert teams to understand MSCI datasets, data delivery platforms, and business workflows.
* Collaborate closely with Product Management, Quality Assurance, Data Operations, and IT Infrastructure across all stages of the development lifecycle.

**Production Readiness \& Engineering Excellence*** Ensure AI solutions meet enterprise standards for scalability, performance, reliability, and maintainability.
* Follow strong software engineering best practices, including test\-driven development, code reviews, refactoring, and clean system design.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and DevOps processes to enable continuous integration, deployment, and monitoring of AI systems.

**AI Governance, Risk \& Compliance*** Ensure AI and GenAI solutions comply with MSCI’s data governance, security, and responsible AI standards.
* Implement controls to support model transparency, traceability, auditability, and reproducibility, especially for LLM\-based systems.
* Apply guardrails to mitigate hallucinations, bias, data leakage, and misuse in AI outputs.
* Ensure appropriate handling of confidential, sensitive, and regulated data in accordance with firm policies.
* Partner with Risk, Legal, Compliance, and Information Security teams to support reviews, audits, and regulatory requirements related to AI systems.


Your skills and experience that will help you excel:
**Required*** 4–7 years of relevant experience in data science, AI engineering, or applied machine learning roles.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related quantitative field.
* Strong hands\-on experience in Python.
* Solid foundation in machine learning, NLP, and statistical modeling, including data exploration and visualization.
* Hands\-on experience or projects involving LLMs, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, or agentic AI systems.
* Experience delivering AI/ML solutions into production environments.
* Understanding of text processing and unstructured data.
* Knowledge of software engineering best practices (TDD, refactoring, modular design, version control).
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills.
* Self\-motivated, proactive, and delivery\-oriented mindset.

**Preferred / Nice to Have*** Experience with cloud platforms, particularly Azure or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Familiarity with DevOps tools and CI/CD pipelines.
* Understanding of data governance, responsible AI, or model risk management concepts.
* Prior experience in financial services or other regulated environments.


About MSCI: **What we offer you*** Transparent compensation schemes and comprehensive employee benefits, tailored to your location, ensuring your financial security, health, and overall wellbeing.
* Flexible working arrangements, advanced technology, and collaborative workspaces.
* A culture of high performance and innovation where we experiment with new ideas and take responsibility for achieving results.
* A global network of talented colleagues, who inspire, support, and share their expertise to innovate and deliver for our clients.
* Global Orientation program to kickstart your journey, followed by access to our Learning@MSCI platform, AI Learning Center , LinkedIn Learning Pro and tailored learning opportunities for ongoing skills development.
* Multi\-directional career paths that offer professional growth and development through new challenges, internal mobility and expanded roles.
* We actively nurture an environment that builds a sense of inclusion belonging and connection, including eight Employee Resource Groups. All Abilities, Asian Support Network, Black Leadership Network, Climate Action Network, Hola! MSCI, Pride \& Allies, Women in Tech, and Women’s Leadership Forum.


At MSCI we are passionate about what we do, and we are inspired by our vision – to power better decisions. You’ll be part of an industry\-leading network of creative, curious, and entrepreneurial pioneers. This is a space where you can challenge yourself, set new standards and perform beyond expectations for yourself, our clients, and our industry.
MSCI strengthens global markets by connecting participants across the financial ecosystem with a common language. Our research\-based data, analytics and indexes, supported by advanced technology, set standards for global investors and help our clients understand risks and opportunities so they can make better decisions and unlock innovation. We serve asset managers and owners, private\-market sponsors and investors, hedge funds, wealth managers, banks, insurers and corporates.


MSCI Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. It is the policy of the firm to ensure equal employment opportunity without discrimination or harassment on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, age, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship, disability, marital and civil partnership/union status, pregnancy (including unlawful discrimination on the basis of a legally protected parental leave), veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. MSCI is also committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to individuals with disabilities. If you are an individual with a disability and would like to request a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application process, please email Disability.Assistance@msci.com and indicate the specifics of the assistance needed. Please note, this e\-mail is intended only for individuals who are requesting a reasonable workplace accommodation; it is not intended for other inquiries. **To all recruitment agencies**
MSCI does not accept unsolicited CVs/Resumes. Please do not forward CVs/Resumes to any MSCI employee, location, or website. MSCI is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited CVs/Resumes. **Note on recruitment scams**
We are aware of recruitment scams where fraudsters impersonating MSCI personnel may try and elicit personal information from job seekers. Read our full note on careers.msci.com

title: Senior Manager - Platform & Architecture
description:
**About the role:**
-------------------


As a Sr. Manager, Platform \& Architecture you will lead the definition, governance \& continuous evolution of the enterprise data architecture vision and roadmap, ensuring strong alignment with business strategy and digital transformation goals. This role is accountable for establishing modern, secure, and scalable data platform architectures that enable advanced analytics, AI/ML, generative AI, and self service data capabilities across the organization.


You will provide strategic leadership in embedding AI into the enterprise data platform, enabling use cases such as predictive analytics, intelligent automation, and generative AI, while ensuring responsible AI practices, model governance, data quality, and regulatory compliance.


The role requires deep expertise in data architecture, cloud data platforms, analytics ecosystems, and platform security, combined with strong people and stakeholder management skills. You will guide the evaluation and adoption of emerging technologies, oversee PoC initiatives, and drive the operationalization of AI/ML and GenAI solutions.


Working closely with data engineering, analytics, AI/ML, security, and business leaders, you will ensure the delivery of trusted, high performing, and future ready data and AI platforms that scale with organizational needs.


**What you'll do:**


### **Strategic Leadership \& Architecture Vision**


* Define and own the enterprise data architecture vision and roadmap aligned with business strategy.
* Establish architectural principles, standards, and best practices across data modeling, integration, metadata, and analytics
* Guide architectural decisions to support scalability, performance, security, and future growth.
* Evaluate and approve new data technologies, platforms, and tools


### **Team Management \& Development**


* Lead, mentor, and manage data modelers \& architects, platform engineers and data engineers
* Set goals, conduct performance reviews, and support career growth and skills development
* Ensure effective workload planning, prioritization, and resource allocation
* Promote a culture of collaboration, documentation, and architectural discipline


### **Data Platform \& Architecture Design**


* Design and oversee end to end data architectures, including ingestion, storage, processing, analytics, and consumption layers
* Define scalable patterns for batch, near real time, and streaming data processing
* Establish standards for data platforms, ingestion frameworks, transformation and modeling approaches, and BI/visualization tools
* Ensure platform reliability, performance, scalability, and cost optimization


### **Platform Engineering, Security \& Governance**


* Architect platforms with security by design, including IAM, RBAC, data encryption, masking, and auditing
* Collaborate with security and compliance teams to meet regulatory and data privacy requirements
* Define and enforce data governance standards, including metadata management, lineage, data quality, and observability
* Support platform monitoring, availability, and operational excellence


### **Advanced Analytics \& Innovation**


* Enable advanced analytics use cases, including forecasting, predictive modeling, and statistical analysis
* Support data science and analytics teams by designing architectures for ML pipelines, feature stores, and model deployment
* Lead Proof of Concept (PoC) initiatives to evaluate new data, analytics, and platform tools
* Assess emerging technologies for scalability, security, integration, and business value


### **Self\-Service \& Data Enablement**


* Drive the self\-service analytics strategy to empower analysts and business users
* Design curated, governed data layers and semantic models for trusted self\-service access
* Reduce dependency on IT by enabling reusable data assets and standardized analytics frameworks
* Partner with stakeholders to align data products with business needs


**Experience you'll need:**
---------------------------


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related field
* 10 \- 15\+ years of experience in data engineering, analytics, or platform architecture roles
* Strong experience designing and implementing modern data architectures and cloud data platforms.
* Hands\-on and architectural experience with:
	+ **Snowflake** or similar cloud data warehouse/data lake experience
	+ **Tableau** or similar BI tools
	+ **Fivetran** or equivalent ingestion tools
	+ **dbt** or similar data transformation frameworks
* Proficiency in **SQL, Python, Spark**, and data modeling techniques.
* Experience with cloud platforms such as **AWS, Azure, or GCP**


**Preferred Qualifications:**
-----------------------------


* Experience with advanced analytics, forecasting, and predictive modeling.
* Knowledge of ML/AI platforms and MLOps concepts.

title: Software Development Engineer 4
description:
**Job Title**


Software Development Engineer 4**Summary of the Role**
-----------------------


The Senior Software Engineer is a technical leader and hands\-on architect who challenges the status quo, drives innovation, and shapes the future of our distributed platforms and products. The role demands strong technical depth, architectural vision, and the ability to ideate, prototype, and scale systems to meet evolving business and customer needs.

* Build systems leveraging Kafka, NoSQL databases (MongoDB preferred), and distributed compute frameworks such as Spark; strong hands\-on experience with Scala and functional programming is desirable.
* Own the full product lifecycle—from feasibility analysis and solution design to production rollout and maintenance.
* Drive ideation, technical spikes, and prototyping to validate concepts and shape future product direction.
* Mentor developers, guide scrum teams, and ensure high\-quality delivery aligned with best engineering practices.
* Collaborate closely with Product Management to understand customer personas, functional needs, and market direction and convert them into robust, data\-driven product capabilities.
* Work with globally distributed teams including Dev Leads, Architects, Managers, and external stakeholders.
* Integrate modern engineering approaches including CI/CD, monitoring, observability, and operational excellence.

**About the Ideal Candidate**
-----------------------------

* 4–5 years in Java with deep expertise in Spring, Quarkus, or MicroProfile; strong command of microservices architecture.

* Exposure to Generative AI, Agentic AI frameworks, LLM\-based systems, and hands‑on experimentation with integrating AI into engineering workflows or product components.

* Experience with Kubernetes, OpenShift, Helm, Jenkins, and modern DevOps practices is an advantage.

* Excellent collaboration, communication, and leadership skills with the ability to influence without authority.
* A self\-driven, exploratory mindset—comfortable experimenting with new technologies, driving PoCs, and independently solving ambiguous technical problems.

**What we can offer you**

* A critical mission and purpose \- At Amadeus, you will power the future of travel with a critical mission and extraordinary purpose.

title: Senior Software Development Engineer (Platform)
description:
**Summary**

We’re seeking a Senior Software Development Engineer to design, build, and operate production\-grade backend services as part of a platform modernization initiative. This hands\-on role owns systems end\-to\-end—from architecture and implementation to production reliability, debugging, and continuous improvement. The engineer will collaborate with Principal and Senior Engineers to deliver secure, scalable, maintainable services that replace legacy functionality with modern, robust platforms.

**Primary Duties**

* Design and build backend services and production APIs.
* Define API contracts, data models, and microservice interaction patterns.
* Review designs and code to ensure security, scalability, and maintainability.
* Select appropriate persistence layers (Relational vs. NoSQL) based on use case.
* Establish patterns and guardrails for GenAI\-assisted development.
* Design for failure—including timeouts, circuit breaking, and distributed transactions.
* Make informed decisions on cloud resources (e.g., DynamoDB vs. RDS, Kinesis vs. SQS).
* Ensure services emit meaningful metrics, logs, and traces.
* Participate in on\-call rotations and incident response.
* Debug real production issues and improve service reliability.
* Contribute to technical design discussions and code reviews.
* Reduce complexity and technical debt in existing services.
* Collaborate with product and platform teams to deliver practical outcomes.

**Qualifications Required**

* 8\+ years of professional software development experience.
* Strong proficiency in Java; ability to review/debug in Python/Node.js environments.
* Deep experience building RESTful APIs for high\-scale systems.
* Expertise in both SQL and NoSQL data modeling.
* Proven ability to evaluate and adopt modern tools and frameworks.
* Experience designing distributed systems on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Experience with event\-driven architectures and distributed data consistency.
* Background in setting up alarms, dashboards, and on\-call processes.
* Experience mentoring SDEs and supporting strong engineering culture.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.
* Strong ownership, accountability, and clear communication skills.

**Nice to Have**

* Experience working alongside or modernizing legacy systems.
* Experience with vector databases or integrating LLMs.
* Background in high\-volume transactional or e\-commerce systems.

title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
description:
**About the role:**

  

We’re looking for an experienced Backend engineer to help drive and evolve our product, focusing on high\-impact innovation projects as part of our Linea AI team. You will be working on cutting\-edge technology and ideas and bringing AI prototypes to production. You will work closely with Labs team to operationalize and scale AI prototypes across many customers.

**What you’ll do:**

* **Design and scale distributed systems:** Architect, build, and optimize highly scalable and fault\-tolerant systems that process **large graph datasets at enterprise scale**, handling **billions of events in real time** from tens of thousands of endpoints with **sub\-second latency**.
* **Solve complex scaling challenges:** Tackle real\-world performance and reliability problems through **deep analysis, profiling, and systematic troubleshooting** in high\-throughput distributed environments.
* **Build with modern infrastructure:** Develop and evolve a **microservices\-based architecture** using technologies such as **Go, Kubernetes, Docker, and Redis**, in a continuously improving production stack.
* **Engineer secure\-by\-design software:** Write hardened, security\-first code capable of **safely processing untrusted data**, resisting real\-world attack vectors, and operating reliably across large\-scale, internet\-facing systems.
* **Productionize AI systems:** Partner with research and product teams to **operationalize AI prototypes**, turning experimental models into **robust, scalable, and production\-ready services**.

**Who you are:**

* **Proven Backend Expertise:** 6\+ years of experience building and scaling backend systems, with strong proficiency in **Python and/or Go**, powering production applications used at scale.
* **Full\-Stack Impact:** Demonstrated track record of designing and delivering **full\-stack applications** that are actively used in real\-world, high\-traffic environments.
* **Generative AI \& ML at Scale:** Hands\-on production experience with **large\-scale foundational models and transformer\-based architectures**, including deploying, monitoring, and iterating on GenAI systems.
* **Agent \& Workflow Systems:** At least 1 year of experience building **AI agents and orchestration workflows** using frameworks such as **LangChain, LangGraph, Genkit**, or similar technologies.
* **ML Systems \& Data Pipelines:** Experience delivering **machine learning systems at scale**, including robust model evaluation, continuous quality improvement pipelines, and data processing using **columnar databases and large messaging systems** (e.g., Pub/Sub, Kafka).
* **Ownership \& Innovation Mindset:** Comfortable working in **remote, fast\-paced environments**, with an entrepreneurial mindset\-driven to solve complex, real\-world problems through innovation and breakthrough technology.

**Good to have:**

* **Security \& Product Domain Experience:** Background building products in **data security, DLP, or application security** environments.
* **Cloud Data \& AI Workflows:** Experience with **GCS and BigQuery**, and familiarity with **LangGraph** or similar frameworks for AI agent orchestration.
* **LLM Evaluation \& Quality Systems:** Hands\-on experience designing or operating **LLM evaluation pipelines**, including automated testing, monitoring, and continuous quality improvement.


Joining Cyberhaven is a chance to revolutionize data security. Traditional tools fall short, but we’ve reimagined protection with AI\-enabled data lineage that analyzes billions of workflows to understand data, detect risk, and stop threats. Backed by $250M from leading investors like Khosla and Redpoint, our team includes leaders who built industry\-defining technologies at CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks, Meta, Google, and more. This role lets you shape the future of data security, alongside experts driven to help customers protect their most valuable information.

*Cyberhaven is committed to creating a diverse environment and is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.*

title: Engineering Manager - SDET - Sales and Marketing Products
description:
**About HighLevel:**
HighLevel is an AI powered, all\-in\-one white\-label sales \& marketing platform that empowers agencies, entrepreneurs, and businesses to elevate their digital presence and drive growth. We are proud to support a global and growing community of over 2 million businesses, comprised of agencies, consultants, and businesses of all sizes and industries. HighLevel empowers users with all the tools needed to capture, nurture, and close new leads into repeat customers. As of mid 2025, HighLevel processes over 4 billion API hits and handles more than 2\.5 billion message events every day. Our platform manages over 470 terabytes of data distributed across five databases, operates with a network of over 250 microservices, and supports over 1 million hostnames. **Our People**
With over 1,500 team members across 15\+ countries, we operate in a global, remote\-first environment. We are building more than software; we are building a global community rooted in creativity, collaboration, and impact. We take pride in cultivating a culture where innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated, and people come first, no matter where they call home. **Our Impact**
As of mid 2025, our platform powers over 1\.5 billion messages, helps generate over 200 million leads, and facilitates over 20 million conversations for the more than 2 million businesses we serve each month. Behind those numbers are real people growing their companies, connecting with customers, and making their mark \- and we get to help make that happen. **Role Overview:**
We are seeking a highly experienced Engineering Manager – SDET to lead Quality Engineering across multiple SaaS products, including Email Builder, Social Planner, Onboarding, and Email AI. This role will manage an initial team of five engineers with a clear mandate to scale the organization to double its size over time.  

The ideal candidate brings deep technical expertise in SaaS CRM platforms, particularly sales and marketing products, and demonstrates strong leadership in driving automation\-first, test\-driven, and shift\-left quality strategies at scale.
### **Responsibilities:**

* **Quality Strategy and Technical Leadership:**
* Define and execute the overall Quality Engineering vision, strategy, and roadmap aligned with organizational goals
* Design, implement, and evolve advanced test strategies, automation frameworks, and quality best practices for large\-scale SaaS applications and Strong hands\-on background as a Test Automation Architect, ideally in TypeScript and Playwright
* Drive the adoption of an Automation\-First approach by building robust automated test platforms and internal developer tooling that accelerate innovation and increase engineering velocity
* Lead the transition toward Test\-Driven Development (TDD) and shift\-left testing practices integrated seamlessly within CI/CD pipelines

* **Product Ownership:**
* Own end\-to\-end quality for multiple products, including Email Builder, Social Planner, Onboarding, and Email AI, ensuring consistent quality standards across all offerings
* Define and govern functional, regression, and exploratory testing strategies across microservices, APIs, SDKs, data layers, and user interfaces
* Drive excellence in non\-functional testing, including performance, scalability, reliability, failover, security, and cross\-platform compatibility

* **People Management and Team Growth:**
* Lead, coach, and manage a growing team of Quality Engineers and SDETs, fostering a culture of technical excellence, ownership, and continuous improvement
* Build and scale a multi\-disciplinary QA organization covering automation, platform QA, data quality, and performance engineering
* Mentor senior engineers and emerging technical leaders, enabling career growth and succession planning as the organization scales

* **Cross\-Functional Collaboration:**
* Partner closely with Engineering and Architecture teams early in the design phase to influence system testability, architecture decisions, and quality outcomes.
* Collaborate with Product Management to define release criteria, risk assessment frameworks, and go/no\-go decisions for launches.
* Work with Customer Support and Customer Success teams to identify real\-world use cases, close quality gaps, and proactively address customer\-impacting issues

* **Metrics, Visibility, and Accountability:**
* Establish and maintain clear, data\-driven quality metrics, KPIs, and dashboards to provide real\-time visibility into release readiness, product stability, and production health
* Use quality data to drive accountability across teams and continuously improve SDLC effectiveness

* **Operational Excellence and Customer Impact:**
* Analyze production issues and customer escalations, drive root cause analysis, and implement preventive quality improvements to reduce recurrence
* Ensure compliance with enterprise standards, SLAs, and customer expectations for mission\-critical SaaS systems
* Act as the final quality authority for major releases and customer\-facing deployments
* Represent Quality Engineering leadership in executive reviews, roadmap discussions, and critical customer engagements

* **Scaling and Continuous Improvement:**
* Act as a key technical leader in solving complex scaling challenges related to automation, infrastructure, and organizational growth
* Continuously challenge the status quo by improving processes, tooling, and engineering practices to support rapid and sustainable company growth

### **Requirements:**

* A minimum of 8\+ years of experience in Software Quality Engineering, with at least 3 years in a people management or QA leadership role within a SaaS environment
* Proven experience defining and implementing advanced test strategies, automation frameworks, and developer tooling in modern SaaS platforms
* Strong and demonstrable understanding of SaaS CRM systems, particularly sales and marketing automation products
* Deep knowledge of microservices\-based architectures, cloud platforms such as GCP/AWS, and modern CI/CD pipelines
* Hands\-on experience integrating automated testing and TDD practices into continuous integration and continuous delivery workflows
* Enthusiasm for leveraging GenAI and AI agents to enhance testing productivity, efficiency, and intelligence

### **Nice to Have:**

* Strong leadership with tech presence with the ability to influence senior stakeholders and drive alignment across engineering, product, and business teams
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to articulate quality risks, trade\-offs, and recommendations to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* A customer\-first mindset with a passion for building reliable, scalable, and high\-quality SaaS products

Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Senior AI Engineer (Data Science)  

Experience: 5–8 years  

  

**About the Team**  

The AI Center of Excellence team includes Data Scientists and AI Engineers that work together to conduct research, build prototypes, design features, and build production AI components and systems. Our mission is to leverage the best available technology to protect our customers' attack surfaces.  

  

We partner closely with Detection and Response teams, including our MDR service, to apply AI/ML to real\-world security challenges. The team values strong technical ownership, high\-quality execution, and continuous learning across ML, LLMs, and agentic AI systems.  

  

**The technologies we use include:**  

* Python for analysis and modelling using numpy, pandas, and scientific computing libraries
* Jupyter notebooks (local \& remote)
* scikit\-learn for machine learning
* Anomaly detection for large\-scale unlabeled data analysis
* Deep learning frameworks for NLP and behavioural modelling
* LLM/GenAI toolchains: HuggingFace, Transformers, LangChain, LangGraph
* RAG pipelines using vector databases
* AWS cloud ecosystem: SageMaker, Bedrock, Lambda, EKS, S3
* CI/CD for ML/LLM (GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
* Monitoring and observability (CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana)
* The role at Rapid7 is for a Senior Software Engineer – Data Science (SSE)
* The SSE will drive end\-to\-end delivery of ML and LLM\-based solutions
* The role requires strong data science execution and hands\-on experience in agentic AI workflows
* The role also requires experience with AWS\-based deployment

  

You will own ML solutions for defined problem areas while collaborating closely with Staff engineers on architecture and standards.  

  

**This role is ideal for someone who is:**  

* Strong in data science and ML systems.
* Experienced with production ML/LLM deployments on AWS.
* Actively building agentic AI and RAG\-based solutions.

 **In this role, you will:**

  

Own end\-to\-end ML pipelines for security use cases:  

* Malware detection models
* Malware behaviour\-based models
* User behavioural analytics
* Design and implement feature engineering pipelines

  

Build, tune, and evaluate:  

* Supervised and unsupervised ML models
* Deep learning models (NLP\-heavy workloads)
* Design and maintain RAG pipelines using vector databases
* Implement LLM orchestration using LangChain / LangGraph
* Apply prompt engineering, guardrails, and governance practices
* Fine\-tune models using LoRA / PEFT where applicable
* Deploy and operate ML/LLM systems using AWS SageMaker, Bedrock, Lambda, and EKS
* Implement model registry, versioning, drift detection, and retraining workflows
* Monitor production models and participate in incident response and on\-call rotations
* Mentor junior engineers and support technical execution across the team


The skills you’ll bring include:

  

Core  

* 5–8 years of experience as a Data Scientist or ML Engineer.
* Strong hands\-on expertise with scikit\-learn, PyTorch/TensorFlow, and Pandas/NumPy.
* Proven experience delivering production ML systems.

  

Strong understanding of:  

* Feature engineering
* Model explainability (SHAP, LIME)
* ML evaluation and tuning
* Solid AWS experience across ML workloads
* Agentic AI \& LLM


Hands\-on experience with:  

* RAG pipelines
* LangChain / LangGraph
* Prompt engineering and evaluation
* Familiarity with LLM evaluation tools (Promptfoo, HELM)
* Understanding of guardrails, governance, and observability
* Experience in cybersecurity or threat detection
* Operating ML systems with CI/CD, monitoring, and retraining
* Exposure to agentic AI beyond single\-agent workflows


We know that the best ideas and solutions come from multi\-dimensional teams. That’s because these teams reflect a variety of backgrounds and professional experiences. If you are excited about this role and feel your experience can make an impact, please don’t be shy \- apply today.  

  

**About Rapid7**

  

At Rapid7, we are on a mission to create a secure digital world for our customers, our industry, and our communities. We do this by embracing tenacity, passion, and collaboration to challenge what’s possible and drive extraordinary impact.  

Here, we’re building a dynamic workplace where everyone can have the career experience of a lifetime. We challenge ourselves to grow to our full potential. We learn from our missteps and celebrate our victories. We come to work every day to push boundaries in cybersecurity and keep our 10,000 global customers ahead of whatever’s next.  

Join us and bring your unique experiences and perspectives to tackle some of the world’s biggest security challenges.

**About Rapid7**
----------------


At Rapid7, our vision is to create a secure digital world for our customers, our industry, and our communities. We do this by harnessing our collective expertise and passion to challenge what’s possible and drive extraordinary impact. We’re building a dynamic and collaborative workplace where new ideas are welcome.


Protecting 11,000\+ customers against bad actors and threats means we’re continuing to push the envelope just like we’ ve been doing for the past 20 years. If you ’re ready to solve some of the toughest challenges in cybersecurity, we’re ready to help you take command of your career. Join us.

title: Senior CX Engineer
description:
**Company Description**  

Experian is a global data and technology company, powering opportunities for people and businesses around the world. We help to redefine lending practices, uncover and prevent fraud, simplify healthcare, create marketing solutions, and gain deeper insights into the automotive market, all using our unique combination of data, analytics and software. We also assist millions of people to realize their financial goals and help them save time and money.


We operate across a range of markets, from financial services to healthcare, automotive, agribusiness, insurance, and many more industry segments.


We invest in people and new advanced technologies to unlock the power of data. As a FTSE 100 Index company listed on the London Stock Exchange (EXPN), we have a team of 22,500 people across 32 countries. Our corporate headquarters are in Dublin, Ireland. Learn more at experianplc.com.

 **Job Description** **What you’ll be doing**


Experian is driving innovation by delivering advanced solutions that redefine how millions of customers interact with us. We’re seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Development Engineer to help shape our next\-generation Intelligent Virtual Assistant (IVA). In this role, you’ll construct dynamic JavaScript components and integrate them with advanced NLP and ML technologies to deliver agentic, frictionless self\-service capabilities. Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction and operational efficiency, enabling smarter, faster, and more personalized experiences at scale.


This role is ideal for a dynamic individual who excels in a fast\-paced environment and has a proven track record of managing large\-scale projects, collaborating with cross\-functional teams by making data driven decisions

**Key Responsibilities:**

* **JavaScript Development**: Develop innovative, scalable components with JavaScript in a specialized scripting framework.
* **Feature Implementation**: Develop solutions to increase automation and create consumer self\-service capabilities across Experian’s contact center channels.
* **GenAI Coding:** Leverage Generative AI coding assistants to accelerate development, improve code quality, and enhance productivity throughout the software lifecycle.
* **Performance Optimization**: Regularly assess, monitor and optimize the performance of applications, ensuring optimal performance and responsiveness.
* **Continuous Integration**: Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate the build, test, and deployment processes.
* **Problem Solving**: Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, ensuring the stability and reliability of the software.
* **Documentation**: Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for developed features, configurations, and systems.
* **US Partnership**: Operate partially within US Central time zone as needed to ensure appropriate alignment and coordination with the US\-based team.
* **Hybrid Work**: Must be able to work in\-office (Hyderabad) 1\-2 days per week, with remote work for the remainder

**Qualifications and Experience Required:**

* **Core Technical Skills \& Experience:** 2\+ years of JavaScript experience required; *must be expert level in this area.*
* **AWS:** Solid understanding of AWS technologies such as DynamoDB and Lambda.
* **GenAI:** Must have strong and demonstrated knowledge of how to leverage GenAI in accelerating coding and testing (GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, MS Copilot, or similar tool).
* **Communication:** Strong verbal and written communication skills, capable of conveying complex technical concepts to diverse audiences.
* **Problem\-Solving:** Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills with a creative approach to challenges.
* **Teamwork:** Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to work effectively with cross\-functional teams.
* **Time Management:** Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.
* **Adaptability:** Flexibility to adapt to changing priorities and new technologies.
* **Attention to Detail:** High standard for quality and precision in all aspects of work.
* **On\-Call:** Participation in an on\-call rotation is required.
* **Additional Skills:**
	+ Previous experience in IVR and/or NLP development is preferred.
	+ Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and tools such as GitLab CI or Jenkins.
	+ Understanding of microservices architecture and RESTful API design.
	+ Knowledge of security best practices and tools for secure software development.


Why Join Us

* Be part of a market leader in data\-driven innovation.
* Work in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment.
* Contribute to products that improve lives daily.
* Thrive in an inclusive and diverse team.

 **Qualifications** **Qualifications**

* Java Script,
* Troubleshooting
* IVA
* Prompt Engineering
* Softskills

  

**Additional Information**  

Our uniqueness is that we celebrate yours. Experian's culture and people are important differentiators. We take our people agenda very seriously and focus on what matters; DEI, work/life balance, development, authenticity, collaboration, wellness, reward \& recognition, volunteering... the list goes on. title: Senior Principal Consultant-AI / ML Solution
description:
Ready to build the future with AI?  

At Genpact, we don’t just keep up with technology—we set the pace. AI and digital innovation are redefining industries, and we’re leading the charge. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry\-first accelerator, is an example of how we’re scaling advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. From large\-scale models to agentic AI, our breakthrough solutions tackle companies’ most complex challenges.  

If you thrive in a fast\-moving, innovation\-driven environment, love building and deploying cutting\-edge AI solutions, and want to push the boundaries of what’s possible, this is your moment.  

Genpact (NYSE: G) is an advanced technology services and solutions company that delivers lasting value for leading enterprises globally. Through our deep business knowledge, operational excellence, and cutting\-edge solutions – we help companies across industries get ahead and stay ahead. Powered by curiosity, courage, and innovation, our teams implement data, technology, and AI to create tomorrow, today. Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, X, YouTube, and Facebook.  

Inviting applications for the role of Senior Principal Consultant\-AI / ML Solution Architect  

We are looking for a hands\-on AI/ML Solution Architect who can design, build, and scale real\-world AI systems—not just prototype models or create high\-level diagrams. This role sits at the intersection of business problems, data, and production\-grade AI engineering.  

You will be responsible for taking ambiguous business problems and translating them into end\-to\-end AI/ML solutions that are reliable, scalable, secure, and measurable in production..  

Responsibilities  

* Solution Architecture \& Design


o Own the end\-to\-end architecture of AI/ML solutions—from data ingestion to model serving and monitoring.  

o Design scalable, cloud\-native AI architectures using microservices, APIs, and event\-driven patterns.  

o Make technology trade\-offs across build vs buy, model selection, infrastructure, and tooling.  

* Hands\-On Model Development


o Build, train, fine\-tune, and evaluate ML / Deep Learning / GenAI models using Python  

o Work directly with Classical ML (classification, regression, anomaly detection), Deep learning (CNNs, Transformers) and LLMs (prompting, RAG, fine\-tuning, agents)  

o Translate PoCs into production\-ready models.

o Design data pipelines for structured, semi\-structured, and unstructured data.  

o Lead feature engineering, data validation, and data quality strategies.  

o Work closely with data engineers to ensure training–serving parity.  

* MLOps \& Productionization


o Build and own MLOps pipelines for Model versioning, CI/CD, Automated retraining, Model monitoring \& drift detection  

o Deploy models using Docker, Kubernetes, cloud ML platforms, or custom inference services.  

o Ensure solutions meet performance, scalability, security, and compliance requirements.  

* Stakeholder \& Technical Leadership


o Act as the technical authority for AI/ML initiatives.  

o Communicate clearly with products, engineering, leadership, and clients.  

o Mentor engineers and data scientists; set best practices and standards.  

Qualifications we seek in you!  

Minimum Qualifications  

* Experience in software engineering, data engineering, or ML engineering.
* Experience in building, designing, and deploying AI/ML systems in production.
* Strong programming skills in Python (mandatory); experience with Java/Scala is a plus.
* Proven experience with end\-to\-end ML lifecycle (data model deployment monitoring).
* Solid understanding of Supervised and unsupervised ML algorithms, Model evaluation and bias/variance trade\-offs,
* Hands\-on experience with PyTorch / TensorFlow, Scikit\-learn, LLM frameworks (LangChain, Langgraph, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, etc.)
* Solid experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, and embeddings.
* Strong experience with AWS / Azure / GCP (at least one).
* Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, REST / gRPC APIs, Streaming systems (Kafka, Pub/Sub)
* Familiarity with ML platforms (SageMaker, Vertex AI, Azure ML).
* Experience with MLflow / Weights \& Biases, Feature stores, Model monitoring \& drift detection.
* Strong understanding of AI observability, reliability, and cost optimization
* Understanding of ethical and responsible AI


Preferred Qualifications/ Skills  

* Strong proficiency in C programming language with experience in developing
* Experience building AI platforms or reusable AI frameworks
* Experience with enterprise\-scale AI systems
* Strong opinion on AI safety, explainability, and responsible AI
* Ability to challenge requirements and simplify over\-engineered solutions


Why join Genpact?

* Committed to ethical AI – Work in an environment where governance, transparency, and security are at the core of everything we build
* Thrive in a values\-driven culture – Our courage, curiosity, and incisiveness \- built on a foundation of integrity and inclusion \- allow your ideas to fuel progress

title: Senior Product Manager - Platform
description:
**About WorkSpan**

  

The next era of growth is being driven by business interoperability. Cloud, genAI, solutions combining services and software\- more and more, companies outpace their competition not just through building superior products, but by creating stronger partnerships, paths to market, and better business models for winning together. Cloud providers, service providers, tech partners and resellers are teaming up to win more deals together through co\-selling.  

  

WorkSpan is building the world’s largest, trusted co\-selling network.  

  

WorkSpan already has seven of the world’s ten largest partner ecosystems on our platform and $50B of customer pipeline under active management. AWS, Google, Microsoft, MongoDB, PagerDuty, Databricks and dozens of others trust WorkSpan to accelerate and amplify their ecosystem strategies.  

With a $30M series C and backing from world class investors Insight Partners, Mayfield, and M12, WorkSpan is poised to drive the future of B2B. Come be a part of it.  

  

**Join our team for the opportunity to:**  

* Own your results and make a tangible impact on the business
* Develop a deep understanding of GTM working closely with leadership across sales \& marketing
* Work with driven, passionate people every day
* Be a part of an ambitious, supportive team on a mission
### **Role Overview**


We are looking for a **Senior / Lead Product Manager for Enterprise Platform \& Integrations** to own the product strategy, roadmap, and execution for our core platform capabilities, CRM integrations, and third‑party integration ecosystem (e.g., Workato, Nylas, and other iPaaS / API partners).

  

This is a high\-impact role that sits at the intersection of:

* **Enterprise**: security, scalability, governance, data model, and cross\-tenant capabilities.
* **Platform**: APIs, events, extensibility, and a great developer / admin experience.
* **Integrations \& CRMs**: native and iPaaS\-based integrations with systems like Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, HubSpot, and ecosystem tools.

  

You will work closely with customer\-facing teams, your peer PMs, engineering/architecture, and technology partners to ensure WorkSpan is the best platform to connect, orchestrate, and operationalize joint B2B motions across systems.

  

What You’ll Do

**Own the enterprise platform \& integrations strategy**

  

* Define and drive the **product vision and roadmap** for enterprise platform capabilities, CRM integrations, and our broader integration ecosystem.
* Translate customer, partner, and internal stakeholder needs into a coherent **platform and integration strategy** that supports both current products and future innovation.
* Define **success metrics** for platform and integrations (e.g., adoption, time\-to\-integrate, reliability, performance, partner attach, ARR impact).

 **Build world\-class CRM and ecosystem integrations**

  

* Own the end\-to\-end lifecycle of **CRM integrations** (e.g., Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, HubSpot, Service Now) from discovery and design through GTM and ongoing iteration. Decide integration strategy embed/extend.
* Define **data models, sync behaviors, and mapping strategies** to ensure robust, bi\-directional data flows between WorkSpan and core CRM systems.
* Partner with customers, SI partners, and internal teams to design **standard integration patterns and templates** for common joint\-selling and co\-marketing workflows.

 **Drive the integration platform and iPaaS strategy**

  

* Own the product strategy for **integration frameworks and connectors** using platforms such as Workato, Nylas, and other integration partners.
* Define and prioritize **connector roadmaps**, reference recipes, and packaged solutions that reduce implementation time and unlock repeatable use cases.

 **Lead core platform capabilities**

  

* Partner with engineering and architecture to evolve our **platform primitives**: APIs, events, webhooks, authentication/authorization (OAuth, SSO), rate limiting, observability, and extensibility.
* Ensure the platform meets **enterprise\-grade requirements** across scalability, reliability, security, compliance, and data governance.
* Champion a great **developer and admin experience**, including documentation, configuration flows, monitoring, and troubleshooting tools for integrations.

 **Engage deeply with customers and internal teams**

  

* Be the **voice of the customer** for enterprise platform and integrations, building deep empathy through regular customer conversations, design sessions, and user research.
* Work closely with **Sales, Solution Engineering, Professional Services, Customer Success, Support,** **and Peer PMs** to understand integration use cases, friction points, and adoption patterns.
* Enable customer\-facing teams with **positioning, demos, solution blueprints, and collateral** for platform and integrations.

 **Lead execution and cross\-functional alignment**

  

* Own **prioritization and roadmap** for your areas using a data\-driven and outcome\-based approach.
* Collaborate with UX and Engineering to ship **high\-quality, lovable products** on time, iterating quickly based on feedback.
* Provide clear **product requirements, specs, and acceptance criteria** for complex, technical integration and platform features.
* As a **Lead**, you will also **mentor and lead other Product Managers**, raising the bar on product thinking, execution rigor, and stakeholder management.

  

What We’re Looking For

**Experience**

  

* 10\+ years of experience in **B2B SaaS Platforms and Integrations**, with significant exposure to **enterprise customers** and complex solution landscapes.
* 5\+ years as a **Product Manager** (Senior or Lead), with a track record of owning strategic product areas end\-to\-end.
* Deep experience building **platform and integration products**, including APIs, webhooks, event\-driven architectures, and extensibility for partners and customers.
* Hands\-on experience with **CRM ecosystems** (Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, HubSpot, Service Now etc.), including integration patterns.
* Strong familiarity with **iPaaS / integration platforms** (e.g., Workato, Nylas) and how to leverage them to scale repeatable integrations.
* Experience building or managing **AI\-powered products or workflows**—for example, LLM\-based assistants, recommendations, intelligent routing, or workflow automation—or strong exposure to shipping features that leverage modern AI/ML technologies.
* Demonstrated success operating in a **high\-growth, entrepreneurial environment**, scaling new or 0 1 products and/or platforms.

 **Skills**

  

* Comfortable collaborating with **architects, engineers, ML, and AI product teams** on topics like data modeling, evaluation, performance, reliability, and responsible use of AI.
* Ability to translate business and user problems into **AI\-enabled use cases**, including designing user journeys around AI assistants, copilots, and automation.
* Excellent **communication and storytelling skills**—able to simplify complex technical concepts for executives, customers, and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Strong **product discovery** skills: customer interviews, problem framing, hypothesis\-driven experiments, and data\-informed decision making.
* Proven ability to **lead through influence**, align multiple stakeholders, and drive outcomes across geographically distributed teams.
* Bias for **action and ownership**, with a willingness to roll up your sleeves and do what it takes to ship and learn fast in a startup environment.

 **Nice to Have**

  

* Experience with **partner ecosystem / co\-sell** products or workflows.
* Background in **enterprise CRM or ERP** products and related partner solutions.
* Prior experience at a company focused on **B2B partnerships, ecosystems, or revenue operations**.
* Exposure to **AI platform tooling** (e.g., prompt management, evaluation frameworks, observability) and thinking about how to productize these capabilities for customers.

  

Location

* **Location:** Bangalore, collaborating closely with global teams across Product, Engineering, and GTM.

  

Company Perks \& Benefits


We offer a compelling **compensation and benefits** package, including:

* Competitive salary, equity, and performance bonus
* Unlimited vacation and paid sick leave
* Latest MacBook and a monthly wellness stipend
* Medical insurance
* Paid maternity and paternity leave
* Work from office policy and a supportive, people\-first culture

  

Why Join Us?

* Help define and scale the **Ecosystem Business Management** category at a company that created it.
* Be part of a **fast\-growing startup** with a strong GTM engine and significant market momentum.
* Work with **smart, passionate teammates** you’ll learn a lot from, in a culture that values openness, flexibility, and continuous innovation.
* Join a **diverse, global team** that celebrates different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences.

  

We are an **equal opportunity employer** and are committed to building an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Python, Java
description:
Rapid7 is a publicly traded Cybersecurity company headquartered in Boston, MA with 17 offices around the world. We are excited to be expanding our Global footprint into India and as we build out our Product \& Engineering teams, we are looking for Software Engineers. As a Software Engineer II you will take ownership of the development of new features for your team, working with cutting\-edge technologies and owning this process end\-to\-end. You will bring a customer\-centric approach with a curiosity and passion for continuous learning. You will be provided with coaching and support to help you further develop your skills to reach your full potential. This is an exciting opportunity to be one of the first hires for Rapid7 in India supporting our growth strategy in a culture that supports trying new approaches and continuous learning.

**About the Team**
------------------


Our Product and Engineering team works with our award\-winning products to help us create a single experience to help customers assess risk, detect threats and automate their security programs at over 10,000 organizations. These teams use best\-in\-class technology, leading\-edge research, and broad, strategic expertise to develop new products and features, and enhance existing features, in order to create value for customers across the world. Our range of solutions spans vulnerability management, detection, automation, cloud security, and penetration testing.


Join our engineering team to help us build and innovate great products on our Insight platform using the latest technologies to make the world a safer digital space.

**About the Role**


The Senior Software Engineer is a key technical contributor who not only implements features but drives the technical direction and design within the team. You will be responsible for tackling the most challenging technical problems, ensuring the scalability and reliability of our services, and elevating the technical skills of those around you.


In this role, you will:

* Lead the design, development, and delivery of complex, high\-impact features and services, ensuring they are scalable, highly available, and secure.
* Act as a subject matter expert for the team's core services, driving Core Java best practices and enforcing high code quality standards.
* Mentor and coach junior and mid\-level engineers on technical design, implementation, and Core Java development standards.
* Collaborate with other Senior Engineers and Architects to define technical solutions and interfaces across multiple services.
* Conduct thorough code reviews and contribute to improving engineering processes, CI/CD pipelines, and operational excellence.
* Drive the resolution of complex production issues, performing root cause analysis, and implementing preventative measures.

### **The skills you’ll bring include:**

* A minimum of 5\+ years experience in software development, with deep expertise in Python, Core Java and object\-oriented programming (OOP) principles.
* Ability to work in Python APIs, FastAPI, Django and experience using Core Java libraries and features (e.g., Concurrency, Collections, I/O). proven ability to quickly learn and contribute in Python development for scripting, tooling, or service implementation.
* Expertise with Core Java features, data structures, and advanced libraries (e.g., NIO, advanced concurrency primitives, and diagnostic tools).
* Solid experience with dependency management (Maven/Gradle) and testing frameworks (JUnit/TestNG).
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI, etc.) and proficiency with version control systems (GitHub/GitLab).
* Experience with Cloud Infrastructure such as AWS / GCP / Azure is good to have.
* Excellent collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to articulate technical designs and tradeoffs to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Mentors teammates in effective use of Copilot/LLM\-driven development practices, improving overall team productivity.
* Designs safe, robust, and testable GenAI\-powered features
* A passion for mentoring, driving technical excellence, and continuous improvement.
  

**About Rapid7**


Our Product and Engineering team works with our award\-winning products to help us create a single experience to help customers assess risk, detect threats and automate their security programs at over 10,000 organizations. These teams use best\-in\-class technology, leading\-edge research, and broad, strategic expertise to develop new products and features, and enhance existing features, in order to create value for customers across the world. Our range of solutions spans vulnerability management, detection, automation, cloud security, and penetration testing.


Join our engineering team to help us build and innovate great products on our Insight platform using the latest technologies to make the world a safer digital space.

**About Rapid7**
----------------


At Rapid7, our vision is to create a secure digital world for our customers, our industry, and our communities. We do this by harnessing our collective expertise and passion to challenge what’s possible and drive extraordinary impact. We’re building a dynamic and collaborative workplace where new ideas are welcome.


Protecting 11,000\+ customers against bad actors and threats means we’re continuing to push the envelope just like we’ ve been doing for the past 20 years. If you ’re ready to solve some of the toughest challenges in cybersecurity, we’re ready to help you take command of your career. Join us.
company_description: Creating a secure digital world for our customers, our industry, and our communities.

title: Senior QA Automation Engineer - AI / ML
description:
We are seeking a detail\-oriented Senior QA Automation Engineer with 5 – 10 years of hands\-on experience to join our team. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in test automation using tools like Selenium, API validation/testing, and experience with various architectural frameworks This role involves creating, maintaining, and executing robust automated testing frameworks to ensure the delivery of high\-quality software solutions.  

In addition to the traditional QA automation tasks, the role also includes test data creation, validation of applications integrated with AI / ML / GenAI workflows.
Automation Framework and Testing:* Design, develop, and maintain modular, extensible, and reusable test automation frameworks and scripts, while maintaining high stability.
* Set up, configure, and maintain the automation environment and data to ensure smooth testing processes.
* Develop and execute efficient automated test scripts to validate stability and responsiveness.
* Create and maintain a comprehensive test automation library with scenarios to ensure thorough requirements and regression coverage.


Testing and Validation:* Assist in functional, regression, and integration testing for new or modified software programs using both manual and automated approaches.
* Collaborate with developers and product teams to identify test requirements and ensure coverage of various workflows.
* Perform validation and create test data for various testing scenarios for the applications / APIs / Agents integrated with AI / ML / GenAI workflows and models as necessary.
* Implement Risk Gating processes to validate outputs for accuracy, bias, toxicity, correctness, and traceability.
* Develop and maintain automation frameworks for continuous validation of applications and AI\-driven features.
* Identify, report, and track product defects, providing clear and concise documentation of issues and potential improvements.


Collaboration and Process Improvement:* Participate in product design reviews to provide input on requirements, automation feasibility, and testing implications.
* Write, review, and verify test plans and procedures for product evaluations and defect identification.
* Accurately estimate testing timelines and work toward targeted on\-time delivery by proactively removing roadblocks.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to align product goals and ensure quality standards are met.
* Operational Excellence:
* Provide feedback and insights to improve the software quality assurance process and methodology.
* Stay up to date with the latest automation tools and best practices involving AI/ML to optimize the automation framework.


Qualifications* At least 5 \- 10 years of experience in developing and executing automated test cases and test plans scripts.
* Proficiency with tools such as Selenium/WebDriver, Playwright or Postman (API automation).
* Strong programming skills in one of Python, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, or C\#.
* Strong understanding of software quality assurance standards, practices, and methodologies.
* Hands\-on experience validating end\-to\-end workflows, edge cases, and non\-functional aspects.
* Ability to design checks for accuracy, hallucinations, bias, correctness, and traceability of model outputs.
* Familiarity with model evaluation metrics (precision/recall, BLEU/ROUGE, toxicity/bias scores) and guardrail patterns.
* Strong skills in synthetic test data generation, data masking, and scenario design using SQL or CSVs.
* Ability to balance individual and team effort in collaborative processes while meeting set deadlines
* Proficiency in API and application / functional validation and experience with API testing tools.
* Extensive understanding and continued learnings around QA methodology, tools, and approaches
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across technical and non\-technical teams.


Preferred* Experience testing AI\-driven products and LLM\-integrated workflows.
* Exposure to ML pipelines and data validation (e.g., feature store checks, dataset drift detection).
* Knowledge of data visualization tools (e.g., Matplotlib, Seaborn).
* Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)

title: Senior Data Scientist
description:
### **Job Title**

Senior Data Scientist
### **Job Description**

**Job title: Senior Data Scientist**

**Job Responsibilities:**

* Analyzes multifaceted and high\-dimensional data problems, developing innovative solutions, formulating sophisticated hypotheses, and creating advanced proof of concepts to validate and refine analytical models.
* Ensures the highest standards of data quality, accuracy, and reliability by designing and implementing rigorous validation protocols, advanced data cleansing techniques, and comprehensive quality control measures, working under limited supervision.
* Leverages GenAI and able to orchestrate multiple tools within Enterprise through integration via Databricks, MCP Server, External tools and more. Candidates should have worked hands\-on in GenAI projects and be able to develop agents using state of the art models and new agentic frameworks.
* Participates in end\-to\-end data mining projects, utilizing advanced algorithms, machine learning models, and AI techniques to extract deep and actionable insights from complex, large\-scale data sources.
* Executes the deployment and rigorous testing of data science solutions and insights, ensuring optimal performance, scalability, and seamless integration with existing enterprise systems and workflows.
* Maintains robust, scalable data pipelines and workflows, leveraging cutting\-edge big data technologies and database management systems to support advanced analytics and machine learning projects.
* Develops, documents, and disseminates comprehensive methodologies, processes, and analytical findings, ensuring transparency, reproducibility, and facilitating cross\-functional knowledge sharing and collaboration.
* Evaluates and implements state\-of\-the\-art machine learning and AI techniques, continuously researching and applying novel approaches to solve highly complex business problems and drive strategic innovation within Philips.
* Presents complex data\-driven insights and strategic recommendations to senior stakeholders, effectively translating intricate analytical results into clear, actionable business strategies and influencing key decision\-making processes.
* Monitors, maintains, and continuously improves the performance of deployed models, conducting regular reviews, updates, and optimizations to ensure sustained accuracy, relevance, and business impact.
* Interacts and collaborates with cross\-functional teams, including IT, data engineering, and various business units, to ensure the successful operationalization, integration, and scaling of data science solutions across the organization.
* Candidate would be involved in end to end engagement from requirements gathering to building ETL pipelines and involve in engineering data and insights appropriate to the end user with enterprise approved tools. Candidates need to wear the hat of a data engineer, analyst, solution architecture and a data scientist to be able to produce the right insights for stakeholders.

**Minimum required Education:**

Bachelor's / Master's Degree in Computer Science, IT, Econometrics, Artificial Intelligence, Applied Mathematics, Statistics or equivalent.


**Minimum required Experience:**

Minimum 8\+ years of experience with Bachelor's in areas such as Data Analytics, Data Science, Data Mining, Artificial Intelligence, Pattern Recognition or equivalent OR no prior experience required with Master's Degree.


**Preferred Experience:**

Python, Application integration, Cloud technologies like MS Azure, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes etc..


**Preferred Skills:**

* Data Analysis \& Interpretation
* Cloud platforms \- Azure, AWS, GCP
* Data Governance
* Statistical Methods
* Python
* Business Intelligence Tools
* Data Mining
* Machine Learning Engineering Fundamentals
* Research \& Analysis
* Requirements Analysis
* Root Cause Analysis (RCA)
* Data Quality Management Systems
* Regulatory Compliance

  

**How we work together**  

We believe that we are better together than apart. For our office\-based teams, this means working in\-person at least 3 days per week.
  

Onsite roles require full\-time presence in the company’s facilities.
  

Field roles are most effectively done outside of the company’s main facilities, generally at the customers’ or suppliers’ locations.
  

Indicate if this role is an office/field/onsite role.  



  

**About Philips**  

We are a health technology company. We built our entire company around the belief that every human matters, and we won't stop until everybody everywhere has access to the quality healthcare that we all deserve. Do the work of your life to help the lives of others.
  

* Learn more about our business .
* Discover our rich and exciting history .
* Learn more about our purpose .

If you’re interested in this role and have many, but not all, of the experiences needed, we encourage you to apply. You may still be the right candidate for this or other opportunities at Philips. Learn more about our culture of impact with care here .

description:

* Serve as a subject matter expert on a wide range of ML techniques and optimizations.

* Create curative solutions using GenAI workflows through advanced proficiency in large language models (LLMs) and related techniques.

title: Quality Engineer - Managed Risk
description:
**About the Role**

At Arctic Wolf, we're redefining the cybersecurity landscape. With our employee Pack members, spread out globally, committed to setting new industry standards. Our accomplishments speak for themselves, from our recognition in the **Forbes Cloud 100** , **CNBC Disruptor 50** , **Fortune Future 50** , and **Fortune Cyber 60** to winning the **2024 CRN Products of the Year** award. We’re proud to be named a **Leader** in the **IDC MarketScape** for Worldwide Managed Detection and Response Services and earning a **Customers' Choice** distinction from **Gartner Peer Insights** . Our **Aurora Platform** also received **CRN’s Products of the Year** award in the inaugural **Security Operations Platform** category. Join a company that’s not only leading, but also shaping, the future of security operations.


Our mission is simple: End Cyber Risk. We’re looking for a Senior Developer \- Managed Risk Platform to be part of making this happen.


**About the Role**

We are looking for a software developer who loves solving challenging problems and enjoys working in a collaborative environment as part of a remote team. You will work with the best talent in the industry and have a chance to use bleeding edge tools to solve complex but interesting technical problems. It is our goal to have you releasing code to our production environments within the first two weeks.


The specific role we are looking to fill is on our scanner team. You will be a part of the fast\-paced and high\-demand team responsible for looking after the ever\-growing number of vulnerability scanners we have in the field. Notable challenges include managing and monitoring the scanner population at scale, keeping the scanners secure and performant at all times and optimizing software to get the most we can out of our hardware.


**You Will:**

* Create and extend software frameworks and tools to run, monitor, and report on automated tests. Have experience building and maintaining Automation frameworks and CI/CD pipeline.
* Review testing strategies, approaches, and test plans and provide insight to development teams.
* Architect, design and build software to automate a variety of testing methods (e.g. API validation, performance/load testing, fuzzing, etc.)
* Develop and maintain test frameworks for GenAI\-based and AI/ML applications, including model validation, LLM prompt\-response consistency, hallucination detection, and regression testing for AI inference APIs.
* Implement evaluation pipelines to test LLM accuracy, latency, bias, toxicity, and reliability.
* Work as part of a team of highly skilled software professionals.
* Continuously learn and expand your technical horizons
* Our Technology Stack: Selenium, Playwright, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (Bedrock, Lambda, SQS, S3, etc.), LangChain, LLM evaluation frameworks (e.g., Ragas), OpenAPI, Postgres, Linux.

**You:**

* Are excited to work at the intersection of AIML, Big Data and the Cybersecurity problem space
* Have **2** \+ years of experience shipping quality software

Love driving high software quality


* Have experience deploying services on cloud computing platforms (e.g, AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Are an expert using common tools for executing functional, load and fuzz testing (e.g. Locust, CATS)
* Have worked on distributed systems and microservices architecture (preferred)

**About Arctic Wolf**

Arctic Wolf recognizes that success comes from delighting our customers, so we work together to ensure that happens every day. We believe in diversity and inclusion, and truly value the unique qualities and unique perspectives all employees bring to the organization. And we appreciate that—by protecting people’s and organizations’ sensitive data and seeking to end cyber risk— we get to work in an industry that is fundamental to the greater good. We celebrate unique perspectives by creating a platform for all voices to be heard through our Pack Unity program. We encourage all employees to join or create a new alliance.


All wolves receive compelling compensation and benefits packages, including:


* Equity for all employees
* Flexible annual leave, paid holidays and volunteer days
* Training and career development programs
* Comprehensive private benefits plan including medical insurance for you and your family, life insurance (3x compensation), and personal accident insurance.
* Fertility support and paid parental leave

**Our Values**

Arctic Wolf recognizes that success comes from delighting our customers, so we work together to ensure that happens every day. We believe in diversity and inclusion, and truly value the unique qualities and unique perspectives all employees bring to the organization. And we appreciate that—by protecting people’s and organizations’ sensitive data and seeking to end cyber risk— we get to work in an industry that is fundamental to the greater good.


We celebrate unique perspectives by creating a platform for all voices to be heard through our Pack Unity program. We encourage all employees to join or create a new alliance.


**On\-Camera Policy**  

To support a fair, transparent, and engaging interview experience, candidates interviewing remotely are expected to be on camera during all video interviews.
   

Being on camera fosters authentic connection, improves communication, and allows for full engagement from both candidates and interviewers.
   

We understand that technical, bandwidth, or location\-related challenges may occasionally prevent video use. If this applies, candidates are required to notify us in advance so we can explore appropriate accommodations.


**Security Requirements**  

Conducts duties and responsibilities in accordance with AWN’s Information Security policies, standards, processes, and controls to protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of AWN business information (in accordance with our employee handbook and corporate policies).


**Background checks are required for this position.**  

This position may require access to information protected under U.S. export control laws and regulations, including the Export Administration Regulations (“EAR”).
